caveat: 50-step host smoke trace for the velocity-gradient conditioning intervention (P1, single seed), re-read from the experiment tracker. The plottable story is the mean flux climbing from 0.874 THROUGH the 0.979 anchor and landing on 1.0000 -- the tell, for the second time in the arc, but this time it slipped past a wide-thresholded gate as a 'pass'. The density collapse that CAUSED the transparency is not visible in this scalar trace: the per-head spread was not logged per step, so it is a step-50 endpoint only (see fig2-head-asymmetry). Single realization / fixed cosmology (Sherwood, one 60 cMpc/h box); z=0.3 scope-lock.
per_head_spread_trace: NOT available (endpoint-only at step 50; see fig2)
